nasb.text: “If a man finds a girl who is a virgin, who is not engaged, and seizes her and lies with her and they are discovered,

esv.text: “If a man meets a virgin who is not betrothed, and seizes her and lies with her, and they are found,

cnv.text: “如果有人遇見一個少女，原是處女，還沒有許配過人，就抓住她，和她同寢，又被人發現，

ccb.text: “如果有人强奸了未订婚的处女，被抓住后，
